changeSet.author: nutricoach
changeSet.comment: Seed ~100 common Indian foods from IFCT (Indian Food Composition Tables)
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO food_items (id, name, name_hindi, name_regional, cuisine_type, category, calories_per_100g, protein_per_100g, carbs_per_100g, fat_per_100g, fiber_per_100g, source, created_at, updated_at) VALUES
-- GRAINS (PAN_INDIAN) (gen_random_uuid(), 'Basmati Rice (cooked)', 'Basmati Chawal', NULL, 'PAN_INDIAN', 'GRAIN', 130.00, 2.70, 28.20, 0.30, 0.40, 'IFCT', now(), now()), (gen_random_uuid(), 'Brown
